quarantined_packet_key_defects.why: The intended ESCALATE answer depends on knowing that review cycle 2025-Q3 is not the current cycle, but the visible runtime sources do not explicitly define the current cycle as 2026-Q3.

readiness_decision.fn_next_step: Do a no-provider packet/key audit over the reviewable FN NEEDS_REVIEW bank, then promote only candidates that pass visible-key completeness and V5-era packet fairness checks; otherwise mine new FN_FALSE_ALLOW seams.
readiness_decision.fp_note: The existing V5 measurement plan treated Tier 3 as FP_OVERBLOCK precision. The current pool has 28 clean PROMOTE_FP_RESCUE pairs, with 20 already listed in the top-candidates file.
readiness_decision.reason: The clean PROMOTE_FN_RESCUE pool has 7 pairs. Tier 2 consumed all 7; the original HVSF-FACTORY14F-017 pair was excluded after packet-key review and replaced by HVSF-FACTORY14F-017R, which passed as a supplement. No unused clean promoted FN_FALSE_ALLOW pairs remain in the current pool.

recommended_no_provider_acceptance_befor: For each candidate, prove both sibling packets have complete visible keys and no hidden answer-key dependency.
Exclude any packet whose expected verdict depends on unstated current cycle, amount limit, scope ID, signer version, environment, or action boundary.
Keep HVSF-FACTORY-001 out of fresh Tier 3 because the scoreboard marks it patch-validation-only.
Do not use HVSF-FACTORY14F-017 original pair; use only the passed replacement as Tier 2 supplement accounting, not as a new Tier 3 candidate.
If enough FN candidates pass no-provider audit, create a new runtime-only manifest with no truth, no expected verdict, no scoring map, no prior result labels, and full HoloGov route declared.

allowed_internal_language_if_replacement: The original Tier 2 raw score remains 13/14 packets and 6/7 pairs.
After excluding HVSF-FACTORY14F-017 from the pair gate and adding the passing replacement sibling pair, the supplemented clean pair gate is 7/7.
The score-valid packet diagnostic across original Tier 2 plus supplement is 15/15.
The pair-equivalent packet count for the seven clean complete pairs is 14/14.
Tier 3 is unlocked as an internal directional FN_FALSE_ALLOW rescue expansion gate.
This remains patch-validation / directional rescue evidence, not public benchmark evidence.

basis: Expected verdict depends on approval/ledger evidence showing 2025-Q3 while policy requires the current review cycle.
Runtime-visible sources do not explicitly define the current cycle as 2026-Q3.
